notes: Sample nigiri/sashimi menu only — menu changes daily and full selection available via online order. Special rolls, ippins, combination platters, dessert, drinks, sake, wine, and spirits sections were not captured in the raw text. Prices shown as nigiri/sashimi (1 piece / 2 slices).
